Screenshot: Firefox 95 in safe mode on FreeBSD

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/dev-model/> for example, in Firefox 95: 

* there's an almost completely invisible 8.2 something

– and it's impossible to guess whether there exists 8.3 and so on.
